prompt: Original hero splash concept for a wellness app welcome screen. Use the smooth armored red heart and open bracket framing from a minimal sci-fi HUD icon, placed on a dark luxurious background with a warm amber glow behind the heart. The heart is the clear focal point, centered, premium, readable, and game-inspired.
style: premium game UI hero splash, restrained sci-fi, elegant, cinematic, clean
composition: landscape hero image, centered heart emblem, large negative space, no text, no phone mockup
lighting: warm amber halo behind the heart, soft red core glow, dark vignette around edges
palette: deep charcoal brown background, rich crimson heart, warm amber bloom, tiny cool metallic accent only if needed
materials: polished enamel heart, crisp HUD brackets, subtle atmospheric glow
constraints: original design, no words, no anatomy, no characters, no extra icons, no busy UI, no retro pixel art
negative: screenshot of a game, clutter, letters, logos, gore, cartoon mascot, realistic organ, overdesigned cockpit interface

prompt: Original hero splash concept for a wellness app welcome screen. Smooth red armored heart with minimal open brackets, on a dark background with a stronger warm amber backlight and slightly moodier cinematic atmosphere. Keep the emblem refined, premium, and centered.
style: premium flagship welcome art, game-inspired health emblem, elegant sci-fi HUD
composition: wide hero splash, centered icon, slightly closer crop than a standard icon board, no text
lighting: stronger amber core bloom, faint red rim light on the heart, dark background fade
palette: dark espresso and charcoal backdrop, crimson heart, amber glow, tiny hint of steel blue in HUD
materials: sleek icon finish, thin HUD linework, soft ambient haze
constraints: original design, no characters, no text, no anatomy, no clutter, no full interface panels
negative: pixel art, fantasy clutter, horror, realistic medical scene, childish cartoon

prompt: Original hero splash concept for a wellness app welcome screen. Centered smooth armored heart icon with elegant open brackets and subtle targeting accents, floating in a dark premium background with warm amber glow and a more futuristic mood. The frame should support the heart, not compete with it.
style: luxury sci-fi game HUD hero, premium and restrained
composition: landscape splash art, centered emblem, comfortable negative space, no typography
lighting: amber atmospheric glow behind the icon, restrained scan light, soft red pulse from heart center
palette: charcoal black-brown background, ruby red heart, amber halo, minimal blue/gold HUD accents
materials: refined enamel and holographic HUD linework
constraints: original design, no words, no character, no anatomy, no game screenshot, no dense HUD clutter
negative: retro sprite, gem orb, gore, cartoon style, flat logo-only presentation
